Package connector.common

    • Method Detail

      • warn

        public static void warn​(java.lang.Class<?> className,
                        java.lang.String message,
                        java.lang.Object[] args)
        Logs a message at WARN level, if enabled for className.
        Parameters:
        className - Class name for logging
        message - message to be logged, can be parameterized
        args - Object array representing the message parameters

      • warn

        public void warn​(org.apache.logging.log4j.util.Supplier<?> message)
        Logs a message at WARN level, if enabled for className.
        Parameters:
        message - message to be logged

      • warn

                 org.apache.logging.log4j.util.Supplier<?>... args)
        Logs a message at WARN level, if enabled for className.
        Parameters:
        message - message to be logged, can be parameterized
        args - Supplier array representing the message parameters

                         java.lang.String message,
                         java.lang.Object[] args,
                         java.lang.Throwable t)
        Logs a message at ERROR level, if enabled for className.
        Parameters:
        className - Class name for logging
        message - message to be logged, can be parameterized
        args - Object array representing the message parameters
        t - throwable to be logged

        t - throwable to be logged

      • trace

        public void trace​(java.lang.String message,
                  org.apache.logging.log4j.util.Supplier<?>... args)

        args - Supplier array representing the message parameters

      • entering

        public static void entering​(java.lang.Class<?> className,
                            java.lang.String method,
                            java.lang.Object[] args)
        Logs a method entering message at TRACE level, if enabled for className.
        Parameters:
        className - Class name for logging
        method - method name of the log entry
        args - Object array representing the message parameters

      • exiting

        public static void exiting​(java.lang.Class<?> className,
                           java.lang.String method,
                           java.lang.Object[] args,
                           java.lang.Object returnValue)
        Logs a method exiting message at TRACE level, if enabled for className.
        Parameters:
        className - Class name for logging
        method - method name of the log entry
        args - Object array representing the message parameters
        returnValue - return value from the method, if any
